title: Battles Robots
summary: You excel in battling robots, automatons, and machine entities.
tiers: Tier 3: Disable Mechanisms or Surprise Attack
Tier 6: Deactivate Mechanisms or Lethal Damage
gm_intrusions: The robot explodes upon defeat. Other robots come after the character for revenge.
text: You excel in battling robots, automatons, and machine entities.
